params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of results to return per page

params.name: offset
params.description: Number of results to skip for pagination

params.name: status
params.description: Filter job requisitions by recruiting status

params.name: supervisoryOrganization
params.description: Filter by supervisory organization Workday ID

params.name: updatedFrom
params.description: Return requisitions updated on or after this date-time

items.docs: Retrieve a collection of job requisitions with optional filtering by status, supervisory organization, job profile, or date range. Returns requisition details including position references, hiring manager, recruiting status, and associated job postings.

info.name: Workday Recruiting Create a Job Requisition

items.docs: Create a new job requisition for a position within a supervisory organization. The requisition defines the hiring need including job profile, number of openings, compensation details, and required qualifications.

info.name: Workday Recruiting Get a Job Requisition

params.name: id
params.description: Workday ID (WID) of the resource

items.docs: Retrieve detailed information for a specific job requisition including position reference, hiring manager, job profile, compensation range, recruiting status, and associated job postings.

info.name: Workday Recruiting Edit a Job Requisition

params.name: id
params.description: Workday ID (WID) of the resource

items.docs: Update an open job requisition. Allows modification of job profile, number of openings, compensation details, qualifications, and other requisition attributes.

info.name: Workday Recruiting Close a Job Requisition

params.name: id
params.description: Workday ID (WID) of the resource

items.docs: Close a job requisition that has no pending events or filled status. Closing a requisition prevents new applications from being submitted and removes associated job postings.

info.name: Workday Recruiting Freeze or Unfreeze a Job Requisition

params.name: id
params.description: Workday ID (WID) of the resource

items.docs: Freeze or unfreeze a job requisition to temporarily halt or resume recruiting activity. Freezing a requisition pauses the hiring process without closing the requisition.

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of results to return per page

params.name: offset
params.description: Number of results to skip for pagination

items.docs: Retrieve a collection of evergreen requisitions. Evergreen requisitions represent ongoing hiring needs without a specific number of openings or anticipated close date.

info.name: Workday Recruiting Create an Evergreen Requisition

items.docs: Create a new evergreen requisition for ongoing hiring needs. Evergreen requisitions remain open indefinitely and can be linked to standard job requisitions for candidate pipeline management.

info.name: Workday Recruiting Get an Evergreen Requisition

params.name: id
params.description: Workday ID (WID) of the resource

items.docs: Retrieve detailed information for a specific evergreen requisition including position reference, linked job requisitions, and candidate pipeline status.

info.name: Workday Recruiting Close an Evergreen Requisition

params.name: id
params.description: Workday ID (WID) of the resource

items.docs: Close an evergreen requisition that has no pending events. Closing removes the requisition from active recruiting workflows.

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of results to return per page

params.name: offset
params.description: Number of results to skip for pagination

params.name: updatedFrom
params.description: Return candidates updated on or after this date-time

params.name: name
params.description: Filter candidates by name (partial match supported)

params.name: email
params.description: Filter candidates by email address

items.docs: Retrieve a collection of candidates with optional filtering. Returns candidate profile information including name, contact details, source, and associated job applications.
Add a new candidate record to the Workday recruiting system. Includes personal information, contact details, and optionally associates the candidate with a job application.

params.name: id
params.description: Workday ID (WID) of the resource

items.docs: Retrieve detailed information for a specific candidate including personal information, contact details, source, tags, and associated job applications.

params.name: id
params.description: Workday ID (WID) of the resource

items.docs: Update an existing candidate record with new personal information, contact details, or other profile attributes.

params.name: id
params.description: Workday ID (WID) of the resource

items.docs: Retrieve attachments associated with a candidate, including resumes, cover letters, and other supporting documents.

info.name: Workday Recruiting Add a Candidate Attachment

params.name: id
params.description: Workday ID (WID) of the resource

items.docs: Upload an attachment such as a resume, cover letter, or portfolio document to a candidate record.

info.name: Workday Recruiting Get a Candidate Photo

params.name: id
params.description: Workday ID (WID) of the resource

items.docs: Retrieve the photo associated with a candidate record.

info.name: Workday Recruiting Update a Candidate Photo

params.name: id
params.description: Workday ID (WID) of the resource

items.docs: Upload or replace the photo for a candidate record.

params.name: id
params.description: Workday ID (WID) of the resource

items.docs: Create or modify a candidate assessment and optionally advance the candidate through job application stages based on the assessment outcome.

params.name: id
params.description: Workday ID (WID) of the resource

items.docs: Submit a candidate referral from an existing worker. Associates the referred candidate with a job requisition and records the referral source.

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of results to return per page

params.description: Number of results to skip for pagination

params.name: jobRequisition
params.description: Filter by job requisition Workday ID

params.name: candidate

params.name: stage
params.description: Filter by current recruiting stage

items.docs: Retrieve a collection of job applications with optional filtering by requisition, candidate, or status. Returns application details including current stage, disposition, and candidate reference.

info.name: Workday Recruiting Get a Job Application

params.name: id
params.description: Workday ID (WID) of the resource

items.docs: Retrieve detailed information for a specific job application including candidate reference, job requisition, current recruiting stage, disposition status, and application history.

info.name: Workday Recruiting Move Candidate to a Different Stage

params.name: id
params.description: Workday ID (WID) of the resource

items.docs: Move a candidate to a different recruiting stage or disposition stage within a job application. Used to advance candidates through the hiring pipeline or to disposition candidates who are no longer being considered.

params.name: id
params.description: Workday ID (WID) of the resource

items.docs: Initiate an employment offer for a job application. Triggers the offer approval workflow and generates the offer letter based on the configured template.

params.description: Maximum number of results to return per page

params.name: jobRequisition
params.description: Filter by job requisition Workday ID

params.name: postingSite
params.description: Filter by posting site Workday ID

params.name: active
params.description: Filter by active posting status

items.docs: Retrieve a collection of job postings with optional filtering by requisition, posting site, or status. Returns posting details including title, description, location, and posting dates.

info.name: Workday Recruiting Get a Job Posting

params.name: id
params.description: Workday ID (WID) of the resource

items.docs: Retrieve detailed information for a specific job posting including title, description, qualifications, location, compensation, posting dates, and associated job requisition.

info.name: Workday Recruiting Update a Job Posting

params.name: id
params.description: Workday ID (WID) of the resource

items.docs: Update an existing job posting with new content, dates, or configuration. Can be used to modify the posting start and end dates.

info.name: Workday Recruiting Post a Job to Career Sites

params.name: id
params.description: Workday ID (WID) of the resource

items.docs: Post a job to internal and external career sites. Requires an associated job requisition in an open status.

params.name: id
params.description: Workday ID (WID) of the resource

items.docs: Remove a job posting from career sites. The job posting record is retained but is no longer visible to external candidates.

params.name: jobApplication
params.description: Filter by job application Workday ID

params.name: dateFrom
params.description: Return interviews scheduled on or after this date

params.name: dateTo
params.description: Return interviews scheduled on or before this date

items.docs: Retrieve a collection of scheduled interviews with optional filtering by job application, interviewer, or date range. Returns interview details including schedule, interviewer assignments, and status.
Create a new interview schedule for a job application. Assigns interviewers, sets the date and time, and optionally configures web conferencing details.

params.name: id
params.description: Workday ID (WID) of the resource

items.docs: Retrieve detailed information for a specific interview including schedule, interviewers, job application reference, and any submitted feedback.

params.name: id
params.description: Workday ID (WID) of the resource

items.docs: Retrieve feedback submitted by interviewers for a specific interview including ratings, comments, and hiring recommendations.

params.name: id
params.description: Workday ID (WID) of the resource

items.docs: Submit feedback for a completed interview. Includes overall rating, competency assessments, comments, and a hiring recommendation. Submitting feedback may optionally advance the candidate to the next stage.

items.docs: Retrieve a collection of background check results for candidates including status, provider, and check details.

info.name: Workday Recruiting Submit a Background Check Result

items.docs: Load background check results from an external provider into Workday. Associates the results with a candidate and job application.

items.docs: Retrieve available background check packages that can be assigned to job requisitions for candidate screening.

info.name: Workday Recruiting Submit an Agency Candidate

params.name: id
params.description: Workday ID (WID) of the resource

items.docs: Submit a candidate from a recruiting agency for a specific job requisition. Creates the candidate record and associates it with the agency source.

items.docs: Retrieve pre-hire and applicant information. Returns applicant records that have been processed through the recruiting pipeline.

info.name: Workday Recruiting Import Applicants in Bulk

items.docs: High-volume applicant import service for processing multiple applicant records asynchronously. Designed for bulk loading of applicant data from external systems.

items.docs: Retrieve position management positions including position details, restrictions, and associated job requisitions.
Create and open a new position using the position management staffing model. The position can subsequently be associated with a job requisition for recruiting.
